title: DASH-101: Add date range picker component
content:
## Summary
Implement a date range picker on the main dashboard toolbar.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Picker supports presets: Today, Last 7d, Last 30d, Last 90d, Custom
- [ ] Custom range uses a calendar UI for start/end selection
- [ ] Selecting a range triggers a data refresh without full-page reload
- [ ] Maximum selectable range is capped at 365 days
- [ ] Works on mobile (375px+)

## Notes
Use the `DateRangePicker` component from shadcn/ui. Hook into the dashboard store.

title: DASH-102: Implement saved filter presets
content:
## Summary
Allow users to save, name, and restore filter presets (date range + active filters).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Users can save a named preset from the active filter state
- [ ] Up to 10 presets per user
- [ ] Presets persist across sessions (stored in DB)
- [ ] Users can rename and delete presets
- [ ] Preset list accessible from a dropdown in the toolbar

## Out of Scope
- Sharing presets with other users (deferred)

title: Dashboard responsive layout spec
content:
## Breakpoints
| Breakpoint | Layout |
|------------|--------|
| ≥ 1280px | Multi-column grid (up to 4 cols) |
| 768–1279px | 2-column grid |
| < 768px | Single column, stacked |

## Mobile Widget Condensed View
On viewports < 768px, each widget must display:
- The primary KPI value (large, bold)
- A sparkline mini-chart (last 7 days)
- The metric label

Full widget controls (filters, export) are hidden behind a `...` overflow menu.

## Widget Picker
A slide-out panel triggered by a toolbar icon allows users to:
- Toggle widget visibility (checkbox per widget)
- Reorder widgets via drag handle (desktop only)

title: Dashboard revamp — QA test plan
content:
## Scope
Functional and regression testing for DASH-101, DASH-102, and responsive layout changes.

## Test Cases

### Date Range Picker
1. Verify all preset options appear and apply correctly
2. Verify custom range calendar allows selecting start < end
3. Verify range > 365 days is rejected with an error message
4. Verify data refreshes without full page reload on range change

### Saved Presets
1. Save a preset and verify it appears in the preset list
2. Verify presets persist after logout/login
3. Try to save an 11th preset — verify error message
4. Rename a preset and verify the new name is reflected
5. Delete a preset and verify it is removed

### Responsive Layout
1. Verify single-column layout at 375px viewport
2. Verify condensed widget view on mobile (KPI + sparkline visible)
3. Verify widget picker opens correctly on mobile
4. Verify drag-and-drop is disabled on touch devices

## Performance
- Measure P95 page load time with Chrome DevTools throttled to 10 Mbps
- Target: < 2 seconds

## Accessibility
- Run axe-core audit — zero critical violations
- Verify keyboard navigation for date picker and preset dropdown
